name: Magnum Ventures Limited
summary: Magnum Ventures Limited manufactures and sells paper products in India. The company operates through two segments, Paper Division and Hotel Division. It offers newsprint, printing, writing, Xerox, wrapping, and packing papers, as well as duplex boards. The company's products are primarily used in newspapers, fine arts, and packaging applications, as well as graphic printing applications, such as book and magazine covers, or postcards. It also operates a five-star hotel with 216 rooms, 11 banquet halls, and approximately 60,000 square feet of meeting space under the Country Inn & Suites by Radisson name in Sahibabad, Delhi. The company was formerly known as Magnum Papers Limited. Magnum Ventures Limited was founded in 1980 and is based in Ghaziabad, India.
